questionHtml:
The diagram shows compounds in the Krebs cycle labelled as X, Y and Z.

[Source: © International Baccalaureate Organization 2019]

How many carbon atoms are there in Y and in the acetyl group of acetyl CoA?

meta.title: The diagram shows compounds in the Krebs cycle labelled as X, Y and Z. [Source: © International Baccalaureate Organization 2019] How many carbon atoms are there in Y and in the ace
